matches.subject: Re: Pilot pricing request: Indian AI voicebot telephony / SIP-WebSocket DID
matches.bodyPreview:
Hello AICloudStrategist Team,

Thanks for reaching out with your detailed requirements. A low-cost, scalable pilot for an India-only AI voice agent is definitely something we can help with.

To provide the most accurate pilot pricing that fits within
matches.bodyText:
Hello AICloudStrategist Team,
 Thanks for reaching out with your detailed requirements. A low-cost, scalable pilot for an India-only AI voice agent is definitely something we can help with.
 To provide the most accurate pilot pricing that fits within your ₹2,000–₹5,000/month budget, I have a few quick questions:
 What is your estimated daily call volume during the pilot phase?
 What is the main purpose of the calls (e.g., lead qualification, customer support, appointment setting)?
 You mentioned several integration methods—are you planning to use a specific voice layer like Vapi, Retell, LiveKit, or a custom solution?
 Once I have these details, I can put together a specific proposal that breaks down all the costs you listed. Would you be open to a brief 15-minute call next week to discuss this? We can also walk you through our integration documentation then.
 Best regards,
 Elision Contact
 snoooz-feedback:0ubmP3JXmShjzehqLbYM
